findings.description: Hardcoded external API endpoint for AlimTalk/KakaoTalk message sending
findings.impact: Production API endpoint is hardcoded in source. No way to switch to different provider or test endpoint without code change
findings.recommendation: Move to ALIMTALK_API_URL environment variable

findings.description: Default CORS origin for local development hardcoded in source (fallback when env var missing)
findings.impact: In production, if CORS_ORIGINS env var is not set, will allow http://localhost:3000 which is a security risk
findings.recommendation: Remove fallback default; require explicit CORS_ORIGINS configuration in production

findings.description: Hardcoded localhost origins as fallback for Socket.IO CORS configuration
findings.impact: Production Socket.IO will allow localhost connections if CORS_ORIGINS env var not set
findings.recommendation: Remove fallback array; require explicit CORS_ORIGINS configuration

findings.description: Hardcoded Redis connection URL fallback
findings.impact: Application will attempt to connect to localhost Redis if no env vars provided. Will fail in production without proper env config
findings.recommendation: Make Redis connection mandatory; require REDIS_URL in all environments

findings.description: Hardcoded Redis connection URL fallback for Socket.IO pub/sub
findings.impact: Redis connection will fall back to localhost in production if env not set
findings.recommendation: Make REDIS_URL mandatory; throw error if not provided

findings.description: Hardcoded Redis host and port defaults in config validation
findings.impact: Redis connection will use localhost:6379 if env vars not provided
findings.recommendation: Make REDIS_HOST and REDIS_PORT required in production; only use defaults in development

findings.description: Hardcoded frontend URL default
findings.impact: Frontend URL falls back to localhost in production if env not set
findings.recommendation: Make FRONTEND_URL required in production environments

findings.description: Hardcoded CORS origins default
findings.impact: CORS will allow localhost only if env not set
findings.recommendation: Make CORS_ORIGINS required in all environments

findings.description: Hardcoded RTMP and SRS API URLs with port numbers hardcoded
findings.impact: Cannot change streaming infrastructure endpoints without modifying config validation
findings.recommendation: Extract port numbers to separate config vars or add flexibility

findings.description: Hardcoded streaming server URLs as fallback in service
findings.impact: Streaming will use localhost if env vars not provided
findings.recommendation: Make streaming URLs required in production config

findings.description: Hardcoded SRS API fallback URL
findings.impact: Admin streaming status checks will fail silently if SRS_API_URL not set
findings.recommendation: Require SRS_API_URL in production

findings.description: Hardcoded WebSocket fallback URL in client
findings.impact: Frontend WebSocket will connect to localhost:3001 if env var not provided
findings.recommendation: Make NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL required in production builds

findings.description: Hardcoded API URL fallback in component
findings.impact: Login redirect will use localhost API if env var not set
findings.recommendation: Make NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL required in production

findings.description: Duplicate hardcoded WebSocket fallback
findings.impact: Real-time product stock will connect to localhost if env not provided
findings.recommendation: Centralize WebSocket URL configuration; use shared constant

findings.description: Hardcoded cart and order expiration timeout values
findings.impact: Cart/order expiration is fixed at 10 minutes; cannot be adjusted without code change
findings.recommendation: Make configurable via env vars (CART_EXPIRATION_MINUTES, ORDER_EXPIRATION_MINUTES)

findings.description: Hardcoded JWT access token expiration
findings.impact: Access token TTL is fixed; cannot adjust security timeout without code change
findings.recommendation: Already configurable but ensure it's being used correctly in all JWT operations

findings.description: Hardcoded Redis connection timeout
findings.impact: Cannot adjust Redis connection timeout without modifying code
findings.recommendation: Extract to REDIS_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MS env var

findings.description: Hardcoded Socket.IO ping/connect timeout values
findings.impact: Cannot tune Socket.IO timeouts for different network conditions
findings.recommendation: Extract to env vars (WS_PING_TIMEOUT_MS, WS_PING_INTERVAL_MS, WS_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS)

findings.description: Hardcoded rate limiting thresholds
findings.impact: Cannot adjust rate limits without code changes; different in dev vs prod
findings.recommendation: Make rate limits configurable via env vars with different profiles

findings.code:
ttl: 60000, // 1 minute
limit: 5, // 5 attempts per minute
findings.description: Hardcoded auth throttler rate limit
findings.impact: Cannot adjust login attempt limits without modifying code
findings.recommendation: Extract to AUTH_THROTTLE_WINDOW_MS and AUTH_THROTTLE_LIMIT env vars

findings.description: Hardcoded pagination defaults (24 items per page, max 100)
findings.impact: Cannot change default pagination without modifying util
findings.recommendation: Extract to PAGINATION_DEFAULT_LIMIT and PAGINATION_MAX_LIMIT env vars or constants

findings.description: Hardcoded Prisma transaction timeout
findings.impact: Long-running transactions may timeout; cannot adjust without code change
findings.recommendation: Extract to PRISMA_TRANSACTION_TIMEOUT_MS env var

findings.description: Hardcoded slow query threshold (100ms)
findings.impact: Cannot adjust slow query logging threshold
findings.recommendation: Extract to SLOW_QUERY_THRESHOLD_MS env var

findings.description: Hardcoded in-memory metrics store max size
findings.impact: Metrics buffer size is fixed; old metrics discarded after 1000 requests
findings.recommendation: Extract to METRICS_STORE_MAX_SIZE env var

findings.description: Hardcoded performance monitoring thresholds
findings.impact: Cannot adjust slow request detection thresholds
findings.recommendation: Extract to SLOW_REQUEST_THRESHOLD_MS and VERY_SLOW_REQUEST_THRESHOLD_MS env vars

findings.description: Hardcoded CSRF token max age
findings.impact: CSRF token expiration is fixed at 24 hours
findings.recommendation: Extract to CSRF_MAX_AGE_MS or CSRF_MAX_AGE_HOURS env var

findings.description: Hardcoded maximum export rows for admin reports
findings.impact: Export is limited to 10000 rows; cannot change without code modification
findings.recommendation: Extract to ADMIN_MAX_EXPORT_ROWS env var

findings.description: Hardcoded exponential backoff multiplier for process restart
findings.impact: Retry delays are fixed at exponential backoff pattern
findings.recommendation: Extract base multiplier to RESTREAM_RESTART_BACKOFF_BASE_MS env var

findings.hardcoded_value: Multiple test phone numbers and zip codes
findings.description: Test data with realistic-looking US phone and zip codes
findings.impact: Mock data in test files (acceptable but should use faker library)
findings.recommendation: Consider using faker or factory libraries to generate test data

findings.description: Hardcoded test user data
findings.impact: Mock data in test files (acceptable)
findings.recommendation: Use faker or factory libraries for test data generation

findings.description: Hardcoded Korean column headers in settlement export
findings.impact: Cannot easily localize or change export column headers
findings.recommendation: Move to i18n (internationalization) library or config constants

findings.code: message: '메시지를 너무 빠르게 보내고 있습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요.'
findings.description: Hardcoded Korean error message in chat gateway
findings.impact: Cannot easily change or localize error messages
findings.recommendation: Move to i18n/translations system or config constants

findings.description: Hardcoded Korean suffix when duplicating products
findings.impact: Cannot easily change or localize product duplication naming
findings.recommendation: Move to i18n/translations or config constant

findings.description: Hardcoded Korean button label in AlimTalk message
findings.impact: Button labels cannot be easily changed or localized
findings.recommendation: Move to i18n/translations system

findings.description: Hardcoded RTMP port number in regex replacement
findings.impact: RTMP port is hardcoded to 1935; cannot use different port without code change
findings.recommendation: Extract to RTMP_PORT env var and use in dynamic regex

findings.description: Hardcoded RTMP port fallback
findings.impact: Defaults to 1935 if port extraction fails
findings.recommendation: Use RTMP_PORT env var as default instead

findings.description: Multiple hardcoded localhost URLs in CI/CD workflow health checks
findings.impact: Staging deployment assumes services are at localhost; breaks with different hostname/IP setup
findings.recommendation: Use env vars or secrets in GitHub Actions (STAGING_BACKEND_URL, STAGING_FRONTEND_URL, etc.)

findings.code: Repeated pattern in useChatConnection.ts, useProductStock.ts, page.tsx, VideoPlayer.tsx, etc.
findings.description: WebSocket URL fallback repeated across 7+ frontend files
findings.impact: Inconsistent WebSocket URL handling; duplicated fallback logic
findings.recommendation: Centralize in a single socket-config.ts or use Next.js config; extract to single constant

immediate_action: Remove all localhost fallbacks in production config validation - require explicit env vars in production
Move AlimTalk API endpoint to ALIMTALK_API_URL env var
Require CORS_ORIGINS in production; no fallback to localhost
Require REDIS_URL; no fallback to localhost:6379
Use feature detection (APP_ENV or NODE_ENV) to make defaults dev-only
high_priority: Centralize all environment-dependent URLs in a config service
Replace localhost fallbacks with explicit error messages when env vars missing
Extract magic numbers (timeouts, rates, limits) to configurable constants
Use GitHub Actions secrets/env for staging URLs instead of hardcoding
Consolidate duplicate WebSocket URL logic in frontend
medium_priority: Implement i18n for Korean strings (error messages, labels, export headers)
Extract port numbers to env vars (RTMP_PORT, SRS_API_PORT, etc.)
Use faker/factory libraries for test data instead of hardcoded values

tasks: Require CORS_ORIGINS in production - remove localhost fallback from config.validation.ts
Require REDIS_URL - remove localhost fallback from main.ts and redis-io.adapter.ts
Add ALIMTALK_API_URL env var - move https://api.solapi.com from source to config
Add APP_ENV check - only use localhost defaults in development
Extract all magic numbers to env vars (timeouts, rates, limits)
Centralize WebSocket URL configuration in frontend
Update GitHub Actions to use secrets/env for URLs
Implement comprehensive config service with validation
Add feature flag system for configuration
Migrate to external config management (e.g., AWS Parameter Store, Consul)

risks: CORS localhost fallback allows unintended local connections in production
Redis localhost fallback may connect to wrong instance in networked environments
External API endpoint hardcoding (AlimTalk) requires code change to switch providers
Port numbers hardcoded make infrastructure migration difficult
security_implications.compliance: Hardcoded dev URLs in production config violates infrastructure-as-code principles and makes compliance auditing difficult
